answers: Start simple: learn to make eggs, rice, pasta, and stir-fry. Master these basics and you can cook almost anything!
Cooking tip: always read the full recipe before starting, prep all ingredients first (mise en place), and taste as you go.
Quick dinner ideas: fried rice with veggies, pasta with garlic butter, omelette with toast, or a simple chicken stir-fry. All under 20 minutes!
Healthy meal prep: cook rice, grilled chicken, and roasted veggies on Sunday. Store in containers for the whole week. Saves time and money!
